g.title: Figure 2 panel. Naturalness gradient and developmental cohort coverage.
g.desc: X-axis: stimulus naturalness. Y-axis: cohort. Target cell at (child, character animation) is highlighted.
g.text: Figure 2. Naturalness gradient and developmental cohort coverage
Marker size encodes number of cards. Modality is encoded by shape and colour. Empty cell at (child, character animation) is highlighted.
Marker size scales with cards per cell.
